title: Phullu
subTitle: Phullu's mother decides to marry him off to make him more mature. Things take an unexpected turn when he learns about menstruation after marriage.

title: Dulaara
subTitle: Falsely accused of murder, Raja becomes a target for Vijay, a police inspector and his lover's brother. In a bid to end his misery and catch the real culprit, Raja sets out on a mission.

title: Shakalaka Boom Boom
subTitle: Reggie, an aspiring singer, faces fierce opposition from an established musician determined to sabotage his career out of personal revenge.

title: Kaun Sachcha Kaun Jhootha
subTitle: Karan Saxena, a police officer, arrests Sapna Mathur, a woman accused of killing his fellow constable. Things take a turn when Karan falls in love with her and helps her escape her death sentence.

title: Daasi
subTitle: When Anoop ditches Mangala, she is forced to marry Anand, a blind singer. After seeing Anand's care, she falls for him but things get complicated when Anoop re-enters the frame.

title: Raja Hindustani
subTitle: Raja, a taxi driver, falls in love with Aarti, a rich girl and marries her against her parents' wishes. Later, her stepmother tries to create differences between the couple.

title: Shiva
subTitle: Shiva, a fresher at VAC College, is forced to stand up against the students' union president and a group of gangsters who have made the college environment increasingly violent.

title: Satta
subTitle: Anuradha relocates to Mumbai where she meets Vivek, an aspiring politician, and marries him. Things take a turn when he is arrested for murder and she has to take his place in the upcoming elections.

title: Swarag Se Sunder
subTitle: Two brothers struggle to keep their family together as external forces like the younger brother's father-in-law try to break them apart.

title: Tridev
subTitle: When an expelled police inspector, an outlaw and a commissioner's son are implicated by a dealer, they unite to seek revenge and prove they are not culprits.

title: Kya Kehna
subTitle: A young university student's world is rocked when her brief involvement with a wealthy playboy results in her pregnancy.

title: Kya Kehna
subTitle: A young university student's world is rocked when her brief involvement with a wealthy playboy results in her pregnancy.

title: Trishul
subTitle: Born out of wedlock, Vijay grows up with deep resentment towards his biological father Raj, a wealthy industrialist who has been leading a comfortable life with his legitimate family in the big city.

title: Dharam Veer
subTitle: Twin brothers separated at birth become best friends, unaware of their bond as siblings. The queen, their mother, becomes the uniting force as they set out to defeat their evil uncle.

title: Judaai
subTitle: Shashikant and Gauri get married in honour of his late father's will. But, marital problems soon arise when Gauri suspects him of having an affair, leading to a chain of misunderstandings.

title: Roti
subTitle: Mangal Singh escapes prison and begins a new life, unknowingly befriending his victim's family. As he seeks redemption, his past catches up, compelling him to confront his previous misdeeds.

title: Abhimaan
subTitle: Subir, a singer, encourages his wife, Uma, to pursue a singing career. However, things take a turn when she becomes more popular than him.

title: Blue Mountains
subTitle: Som's mother sees her son's selection for a singing reality show as a second chance to fulfil her own dreams. However, complications arise when he faces a quick defeat.

title: Bluff Master
subTitle: Ashok, a fraudster, pretends to be rich and cheats several people. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with Seema.

title: Amar Akbar Anthony
subTitle: Three brothers, each raised in different religious households, reunite after many years in a chance encounter. They set out to take revenge on those responsible for separating them.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: Twins Amit and Kishan are separated at birth. However, when their paths cross in the future, together they work their way through and strive to overcome challenges.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: Twins Amit and Kishan are separated at birth. However, when their paths cross in the future, together they work their way through and strive to overcome challenges.

title: Sachaa Jhutha
subTitle: After his lookalike, Ranjith, convinces Bhola to impersonate him for money, an innocent Bhola soon finds himself in trouble when the police chase after him for Ranjith's crimes.

title: Shatranj Ke Khilari
subTitle: In 1856, General Outram declares that the kingdom of Oudh in Lucknow is under British rule. Meanwhile, two noblemen fail to notice this massive political change, obsessing over a game of chess.

title: Karz Chukana Hai
subTitle: After losing his job owing to his arrogance and subsequently his son, Vijay, Atmaram realises his mistake and decides to turn over a new leaf.

title: Maha Badmaash
subTitle: A casino owner is trapped by a gangster and forced to work for him. However, when he refuses to kill a commissioner, the gangster abducts his secretary and sister to blackmail him.

title: Jajantaram Mamantaram
subTitle: Aditya finds himself on an island after surviving a shipwreck. Here, he realises he is a giant amongst its inhabitants, who think he going to save them from a terrifying demon.

title: 3 Deewarein
subTitle: While filming a documentary in a prison, Chandrika comes across three unique stories and, somewhere in between, finds what her heart has been seeking.

title: Rajnigandha
subTitle: Deepa, a young woman, meets Sanjay and falls in love with him. But when she goes to Bombay to look for a job, the arrival of a former lover puts her in a quandary.

title: Sau Din Saas Ke
subTitle: Durga marries Prakash, unaware of his mother Bhawani Devi's dominating and abusive nature. She later insists on moving in with his family in order to teach Bhawani Devi a lesson.

title: Love Ke Liye Kuch Bhi Karega
subTitle: Prakash plans to extort money from his distrusting father-in-law. Rahul and Harry, who are in desperate need of cash, join hands with Prakash and help kidnap his wife as part of the plan.

title: Joshila
subTitle: A jailor's daughter falls for a prisoner poet, believing him wrongly convicted and strives to prove his innocence and secure his release.
